verse_text: Heaven and earth will pass away, but My words will by no means pass away.

links.context: The NT teaching that the present world will pass away (see [[MAT.5:18]]; [[MRK.13:31]]; 1Co 7:31; [[2PE.3:10]]-13; [[1JN.2:17]]) does not mean the present creation will be utterly destroyed. It will be totally renewed (5:9; 21:5; Is 65:17-25; [[ROM.8:19]]-22; [[2CO.5:17]]; [[2PE.3:13]]): freed from corruption, purified, transfigured, glorified. The first cosmos will pass away.
